Name: _root
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT "public"."user_departments".*, "__cs_grp_keys"."_join_key" AS "__cs_join_key" FROM unnest($1::uuid[]) AS "__cs_grp_keys"("_join_key") LEFT JOIN "public"."user_departments" ON "public"."user_departments"."user_id" = "__cs_grp_keys"."_join_key") , "_root.windowed" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT "_root.base".*, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY "__cs_join_key" ORDER BY "_root.base"."department_id" ASC) AS "__cs_rn" FROM "_root.base") SELECT coalesce(json_agg("per_group"), '[]'::json) AS "_root" FROM (SELECT json_build_object('_join_key', "_root.keys"."__cs_join_key", 'aggregate', json_build_object('count', COUNT("_root.windowed"."user_id")), 'nodes', coalesce(json_agg(row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.windowed"."role" AS "role", "_root.windowed"."department_id" AS "department_id") AS "_e")) ORDER BY "_root.windowed"."department_id" ASC) FILTER (WHERE "_root.windowed"."user_id" IS NOT NULL), '[]'::json)) AS "per_group" FROM (SELECT DISTINCT "__cs_join_key" FROM "_root.windowed") AS "_root.keys" LEFT JOIN "_root.windowed" ON "_root.keys"."__cs_join_key" = "_root.windowed"."__cs_join_key" AND "_root.windowed"."user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "__cs_rn" > $2 AND "__cs_rn" <= $3 GROUP BY "_root.keys"."__cs_join_key") AS "_groups"
